title: Dump User Local Security Questions
html:
Dump User Local Security Questions

{% hint style="warning" %}
You need at least local admin privilege on the remote target
{% endhint %}

New NetExec module to dump a local user's security questions if they have them.

nxc smb <ip> -u <username> -p <password> -M security-questions
